summary: Task 016 is complete in substance. The repo now has a dedicated server-only Mina AI config/client boundary, notes and links share one enrichment-state contract in both Prisma and repo/service layers, and the real-endpoint promotion gate is explicit in docs plus the shared `tests/e2e/ai-real.ts` helper and downstream AI task contracts. The provided deterministic `npm run verify` result passed, and I did not find ambiguity in credential handling, failure-state rules, or promotion commands for this foundation slice.
satisfied_exit_criteria: One narrow server-side AI integration path exists via `src/features/ai/config.ts` and `src/features/ai/client.ts`, both marked server-only and used as the shared Mina endpoint boundary.

Notes and links share the same enrichment-state contract through Prisma fields (`enrichmentStatus`, `enrichmentError`, `enrichmentAttempts`, `enrichmentUpdatedAt`) and shared normalization/types in `src/features/enrichment/types.ts`, with matching repo/service methods.

AI-task promotion rules explicitly require the real-endpoint E2E path when `LLM_BASE`, `TOKEN`, and `MODEL` are configured, documented in `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/RELIABILITY.md`, `docs/design-docs/ai-enrichment-lifecycle.md`, and enforced in queued task contracts `017` and `018` with `npm run test:e2e -- --grep @ai-real`.
`npm run verify` is reported passing in the deterministic check summary.
